description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The front features a gated driveway with two parking spaces, flanked by tall palm trees and a manicured lawn. The structure is primarily white and gray, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open to a lush backyard garden. The backyard includes a shaded patio area, outdoor seating, and a variety of mature trees providing privacy and greenery. The building's exterior combines concrete, glass, and wood accents, giving it a contemporary and inviting appearance. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between interior rooms and exterior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a lush garden, featuring a gated driveway and open indoor-outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, two parking spaces, palm trees, and the main entrance with a visible garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, large windows, and the backyard garden with mature trees and a shaded patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, outdoor seating area, and the seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended garden, patio cover, and the arrangement of windows along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
